news.t: The RPAR Risk Parity ETF Exceeds $1 Billion AUM

overview.description: The RPAR Risk Parity ETF (RPAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds allocating to four major asset classes: global equities, US Treasurys, commodities and TIPS based on risk parity. RPAR was launched on Dec 13, 2019 and is issued by Tidal.

data.title: The RPAR Risk Parity ETF Exceeds $1 Billion AUM
data.text: RPAR is now one of the largest alternative ETFs in the U.S.
